name: Lygon Heritage
recipeIngredient: 4 Raspberries Threaded On A Stick, frozen, Rolled In
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake the creme de framboise, lime cordial, and fresh lemon juice with plenty of ice in a cocktail shaker.
2. Strain the mixture into a champagne flute.
3. Carefully top up the glass with champagne.
4. Serve with a raspberry swizzle.
